input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
server: eliminate panicking root GraphQL Query resolvers + add gqlgen SetRecoverFunc [ddx-a57814a7]

Fix FEAT-002 reliability: 15 root Query resolvers were panic("not implemented") stubs
causing opaque 500 errors and stderr spam. Verified via frontend grep that all 15
fields are UI-unused (health, ready, metrics*, beadDepTree, doc*, providers, provider).

- Add gqlgen SetRecoverFunc that converts resolver panics to structured GraphQL
  errors, eliminating HTTP 500 and stack trace leaks to the client
- Remove 14 UI-unused panicking fields from schema.graphql
- Remove corresponding resolver stubs from resolver.go
- Verified: cd cli && go test ./internal/server/graphql/... passes
- Verified: lefthook run pre-commit passes

Note: Search field still panics per spec (separate full-text-search bead in scope).
Project-scoped doc GraphQL is a separate bead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

**AC #5 - Pre-commit gate**: `lefthook run pre-commit ✓` All checks pass (go-fmt, go-lint, go-build, go-test, etc.)
